comments.author: @EpicEarthYTB
comments.text:
🌊 After exploring Cape Verde, how would you rate this destination from 0–10?
🌍 We'd also love to know where you're watching from. Leave your country or city in the comments and join our growing community of travel lovers from around the world.
✨ If you enjoyed this journey through volcanic islands, Atlantic culture, and hidden corners of the world, please consider subscribing and sharing the channel with someone who loves travel and discovery.
🤝 Every like, comment, and subscription helps us bring more unique destinations, fascinating cultures, and untold stories to future documentaries.
Thank you for traveling the world with us.

comments.author: @darrenmccarthy3346
comments.text: This past weekend was not a good one for Portuguese speaking peoples. First on Saturday, Cabo Verde lost.....then the following day Brazil lost.....and finally the mother country lost ! I have a Portuguese friend who bragged that pork chops can root for three different teams in the World Cup all because they speak Portuguese ! I said to him, then who do you follow ? He replied that as long as there was any Portuguese speaking team left, all true blooded pork chops would root for them. Needless to say, guess who isn't watching any more World Cup games 🤣😂😅😆😄

comments.author: @georgealcaraz4967
comments.text: I live in San Diego California but I saw this video cause I wanted to know more about cape verde. Im a huge soccer fan and im mexican american. I am a Mexico fan and a USA soccer fan and now im a cape verde fan. Yes you cape verde football team you captured the hearts of people from around the world cause of what you guys did on the pitch. You proved that there is no giant that cant be defeated in Spain and Uruguay plus Saudia Arabia and the game of the century against the world champions in Argentina. You outplayed the best team in this world. You almost won but respect for your team. They were tough they were resilient and they were so disciplined and respectful to everyone. I will follow that soccer team more and maybe one day Ill visit cape verde. Thank you for the soccer matches you put on at the world cup of 2026. God bless you all. 🙏

comments.text: I dont see flat land. Where do they play football?

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: Passion finds a way! ⚽️ Since flat land is scarce, you'll see people playing everywhere—on the beautiful sandy beaches, in narrow street corners, and on small artificial pitches carved into the hills. The lack of 'perfect' ground is actually what makes their players so technical and tough! 🦈🌊

comments.author: @juliadoula
comments.text: En Puerto Rico crecemos escuchando de Cabo Verde todos los años especialmente durante los meses de agosto y septiembre. ¿Por qué?  Porque durante esos meses escuchamos de las tormentas que salen de Cabo Verde rumbo al Caribe y con cada una de ellas se activa nuestro plan de preparación para huracanes. Las islas de Cabo Verde son muy bellas y, a pesar de que siempre oí hablar de ellas, nunca las había visto. Gracias por este video.
